subject: meeting w/marcie edwards, anaheim general manager

emails.subject: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.subject_base: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.body: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager Greetings: I just talked to Marcie. She's interested, but wants some more info to examine before setting up a meeting. Aren't there some press articles about the sort of muni partnerships you want to pursue with SMUD and Anaheim? Do we have anything else that I can email to her to wet her whistle for the meeting? Will get back to you very soon about meeting with Schori at SMUD. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.subject_base: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.body: RE: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager Hi Jeff...I have an intro letter, and the presentation that we typically give on our first visit. Do you think one of those might be appropriate, or shall I put together something in between the two? To: Scheuer, Janelle

emails.subject: RE: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.subject_base: Meeting w/Marcie Edwards, Anaheim General Manager
emails.body: Can you forward me both? I'll take a look at them. Maybe they'll do the trick. Also, do you have that press article where we partnered with a muni (in Canada, I think)? To: Dasovich, Jeff
